subcodes.title: Lawh-i-'Ammih (Tablet to the Aunt)
subcodes.first_line: O kind aunt! The world hath been stirred into motion by the life-giving breezes of the disposition of thy august Brother
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اشرقت الانوار و القوم فی عمه عظیم قد ظهرت الاسرار و الناس فی دهش قدیم
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual transformation, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @chastisement and requital, @call to action, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
